title: pyrus sordida
intro: Pyrus sordida, also known as the Sichuan pear or Chinese pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pyrus sordida include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese herbal formulas to support overall well-being.
